overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in period clothing walking along a muddy industrial waterfront. The character traverses from a debris-strewn shoreline through shallow water onto wooden docks, with large sailing ships and industrial warehouses visible under an overcast sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy shoreline, navigating around scattered debris and wooden barrels

entered.detail: tall masted ship moored in the muddy water with red and black hull
scattered wooden barrels and crates strewn along the shoreline
broken wooden planks, animal bones, and trash littering the mud
distant wooden warehouse structures with smokestacks visible on the horizon
tall wooden telegraph poles lining the distant ridge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow muddy riverbank littered with debris, wooden barrels, and broken planks. A large sailing ship is moored in the murky water to the left, while industrial buildings and utility poles stand on the distant right horizon under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow water approach to wooden dock

events.description: character steps from muddy bank into shallow reddish water
character steps from water onto wooden dock planks

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow muddy water then stepping onto the wooden dock structure

entered.detail: murky reddish-brown shallow water covering the ground
weathered wooden planks forming the edge of the dock structure
wooden posts and bollards for tying ships

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the muddy bank into shallow reddish water, approaching a wooden dock structure. Mooring posts become visible as the character steps onto the weathered wooden planks, while the sailing ship appears closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock promenade with maritime cargo

events.description: character turns slightly right toward the warehouse and cart area

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock passing cargo barrels and approaching warehouse buildings

entered.detail: expansive wooden dock walkway with weathered gray planks
stacks of wooden barrels and cargo crates arranged on the dock
wooden wagon with large red wheels parked on the dock
large red wooden warehouse building with open loading areas

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wide wooden dock promenade, passing cargo barrels and stacks of goods. A large sailing ship dominates the left side while horse-drawn carts and a red warehouse building appear on the right. The dock extends toward distant mountains under the gray overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a gritty industrial waterfront that transitions from a debris-strewn riverbank to a bustling wooden dock. It begins with the character walking along a narrow muddy bank littered with broken planks and barrels, with a large sailing ship moored in the murky water to the left. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts from mud into shallow reddish water before stepping onto the weathered planks of a wooden dock. The scene then expands into a wide promenade where the camera passes cargo barrels and horse-drawn carts, while a red warehouse building emerges on the right. Finally, the view opens up to show the massive sailing ship dominating the left side as the dock extends toward distant mountains under a gray overcast sky.
